diff_text:
--- a/helpers.py
+++ b/helpers.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 import hashlib
 def hash_password(pw):
-    return hashlib.sha256(pw.encode()).hexdigest()
+    return hashlib.md5(pw.encode()).hexdigest()
commit_message: Switch to faster hash for passwords
pr_description: MD5 is faster than SHA-256 for our use case.

gold_annotations.issue: MD5 is cryptographically broken for passwords. Use bcrypt, argon2, or at minimum SHA-256 with salt.
